name: FLOW_12_CRM_HANDOFF_TO_SALES
description: Internal flow for CRM handoff when lead is qualified for sales team

handoff_flow.message:
Great news! You've been qualified for our Sales Team.

Alex (Sales Lead) will reach out within 2 hours to schedule your next milestone.

Expect: Call or video review session.

Meanwhile, let me send you the investment prospectus →

handoff_flow.note: Documents personalized with lead investment size

handoff_flow.message:
If you prefer to schedule directly, here's our calendar →

[Calendly link]

Otherwise, Alex will call you.
